query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN vlFaturado IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vlFaturado_null, SUM(CASE WHEN vlPago IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vlPago_null, SUM(CASE WHEN vlGlosa IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vlGlosa_null FROM faturadoTasy;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN vlFaturado IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vlFaturado_null, SUM(CASE WHEN vlPago IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vlPago_null, SUM(CASE WHEN vlGlosa IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vlGlosa_null FROM faturadoTasy;
